query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, l.video_url, CHAR_LENGTH(l.content) as content_length
FROM lessons l
WHERE l.video_url IS NOT NULL AND l.video_url != ''
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user U12DfRhAFBW6sMR.root --database LDLtnU3Ggjm84uQbZLmZ7C --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, l.video_url, CHAR_LENGTH(l.content) as content_length
FROM lessons l
WHERE l.video_url IS NOT NULL AND l.video_url != ''
LIMIT 10;
